nasb.text: Then he presented the ram of the burnt offering, and Aaron and his sons laid their hands on the head of the ram.

esv.text: Then he presented the ram of the burnt offering, and Aaron and his sons laid their hands on the head of the ram.

cnv.text: 摩西把燔祭的公綿羊牽來，亞倫和他的兒子按手在公綿羊的頭上。

ccb.text: 然后，摩西献上作燔祭的公绵羊，亚伦父子们把手放在羊头上。
